title: verbascum × fragriforme
intro: Verbascum × fragriforme, also known as Fragrant Mullein, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Verbascum genus and is valued for its unique fragrance and medicinal properties. The plant contains saponins, flavonoids, and mucilages, which contribute to its therapeutic effects, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × fragriforme include soothing respiratory issues, reducing skin irritation, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
